title: Sabaody’s Cruel World: Turning Point

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: What? What? I definitely hit him!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: It just went straight through his head!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Kizaru, aren't you overdoing things a bit!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: You can't knock down Yaruki Mangroves!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: That's crazy... so that's Admiral Kizaru, huh...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: apoo, let's get out of here already!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: We need reinforce- ments at the Harbor!!

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: They've turned into children or old men!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Where are your men!? Give it up!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I'd like to ask you something...
